channel.title: Events on Hua Tuo Studio
channel.description: Recent content in Events on Hua Tuo Studio

item.title: A night at Enlighten
item.description:
Enjoyed a night @enlighten_canberra with T and my furbaby.

Enlighten is Canberra’s annual light show.

Enlighten Festival 2026 lit up Canberra once again with eleven nights of spectacular Illuminations, stunning art installations, captivating performances, live music, food and after-dark experiences. (Enlighten Festival)

I’ve been to this event almost every year. Walking around can be tiring. I had to carry my furbaby in the end 😄 it was well past his bedtime. I wonder if I would come if I didn’t have a guest 😜
